About Me

Hi, my name is Logan and I’m a senior software engineer. I love to build application with my skills and looking forward to create something that make real impact.

Software Projects

Mobile's component defect inspection

  • Developed a deep CNN-based classification model using TensorFlow that improves the traditional image processing-based method which is hard to filter out the complicated texture defect.
  • Achieved a significant performance, whose goal is the miss rate less than 3%.
    Detail (written in chinese)

SCADA Platform

  • Designed and developed a SCADA-like platform using C# that improves the speed of fetching data from different equipment and other time-consuming work like data standardized.
  • Integrated different protocol like Modbus or Socket to fetch data simultaneously.
    Detail (written in chinese)

iOS App

  • Developed an iOS application using Objective-C that allows Foxconn’s employee to easily learn professional courses online.
  • Utilized web service API to fetch all of data like text, picture, and media from backend database for lower computation cost on the app.
    Detail (written in chinese)

Surveillance System

  • Developed a Surveillance System using C# that allows user to effortlessly observe the quality of video.
  • Integrated Hikvision, Dahua SDK(Hikvision and Dahua are both the world’s leading security surveillance products supplier), and OpenCV library to develop the quality of video inspection algorithm.
    Detail (written in chinese)
